news.title: Senmiao Technology Unit Launches JV With Constant Energy Construction to Build AI Data Centers in US; Shares Slump Pre-Bell
AIHS and CECC Form Joint Venture to Develop, Invest In, Construct and Operate AI Data Centers in the United States
Senmiao Technology Appoints David Nichols as Strategic Advisor to Advance AI Data Center, Digital Infrastructure, and New Energy Strategy
